zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel FitzUrse於1137年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布爾維其可時，她的父親Richard FitzUrse42歲，母親Matilda Boulers40歲。她於1173年之前與Benedict de Gernet在英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯培可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1207年在英國藍卡爾斯培可享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel FitzUrse于1137年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布爾維其可时，她的父亲Richard FitzUrse42岁，母亲Matilda Boulers40岁。她于1173年之前与Benedict de Gernet在英国英格兰藍卡爾斯培可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1207年在英国藍卡爾斯培可享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel FitzUrse was born in 1137, in Bulwick, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Richard FitzUrse, was 42 and her mother, Matilda Boulers, was 40. She married Benedict de Gernet before 1173, in Speke, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1207, in Speke, Lancashire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel FitzUrse est née en 1137, à Bulwick, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard FitzUrse, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Matilda Boulers, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Benedict de Gernet avant 1173, à Speke, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1207, à Speke, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel FitzUrse 1137 in Bulwick, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard FitzUrse 42 und ihre Mutter Matilda Boulers 40. Sie hat vor 1173 in Speke, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Benedict de Gernet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1207 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Speke, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel FitzUrse è nata il nel 1137 nel Bulwick, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Richard FitzUrse, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Matilda Boulers, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Benedict de Gernet prima del 1173, nel Speke, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1207, nel Speke, Lancashire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabel FitzUrseが1137年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブルウィックで生まれた時，父Richard FitzUrseは42歳，母Matilda Boulersは40歳であった。1173年以前にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスペクでBenedict de Gernetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1207年にイギリスランカシュアイアスペクで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel FitzUrse(이)가 1137년 영국 노르섬프토실르 버윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard FitzUrse(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Boulers(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1173년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스p크에서 Benedict de Gernet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1207년 영국 랭카실르 스p크에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel FitzUrse nasceu em 1137, em Bulwick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard FitzUrse, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Boulers, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Benedict de Gernet antes 1173, em Speke, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1207, em Speke, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel FitzUrse родилась в 1137 г. в местности булвикк, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard FitzUrse было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Boulers, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Benedict de Gernet перед 1173 г. в местности спек, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1207 г. в местности спек, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabel FitzUrse nació en 1137, en Bulwick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard FitzUrse, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Matilda Boulers, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Benedict de Gernet antes de 1173, en Speke, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1207, en Speke, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
